cards.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client
WHERE geo_lat IS NOT NULL
  AND geo_lng IS NOT NULL

SELECT ROUND(AVG(price_usd)::numeric, 0) AS avg_usd
FROM leads_client
WHERE geo_lat IS NOT NULL
  AND geo_lng IS NOT NULL
  AND price_usd IS NOT NULL

SELECT
  geo_lat AS latitude,
  geo_lng AS longitude,
  district_name AS "Район",
  rooms AS "Комнаты",
  price_usd AS "Цена USD"
FROM leads_client
WHERE geo_lat IS NOT NULL
  AND geo_lng IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY synced_at DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 500
